# LkoMetro — Full Reference

## What this app is
LkoMetro is an independent, community-built companion app for the Lucknow Metro Red Line.
It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or representing the Uttar Pradesh Metro Rail
Corporation (UPMRC) or any government entity. All timing and fare data is sourced from or
derived from the official UPMRC website: https://lucknow.upmetrorail.com/

## Lines

### Red Line (operational since 8 March 2019)
- Terminals: CCS International Airport ↔ Munshipulia
- Length: 22.87 km
- Stations: 21
- End-to-end runtime: 40 minutes
- Peak headway: 5 minutes 30 seconds (8–11 AM and 5–8 PM, weekdays)
- Off-peak headway: ~8 minutes
- Operating hours: 6:00 AM – 10:00 PM
- Underground stations: Hussainganj, Sachivalaya, Hazratganj
- Station list in order: CCS Airport, Amausi, Transport Nagar, Krishna Nagar, Singar Nagar,
  Alambagh, Alambagh Bus Stand, Mawaiya, Durgapuri, Charbagh, Hussainganj, Sachivalaya,
  Hazratganj, KD Singh Babu Stadium, Vishvavidyalaya, IT Chauraha, Badshah Nagar,
  Lekhraj Market, Bhootnath Market, Indira Nagar, Munshipulia

### Blue Line (under construction, Phase 1B, target ~2029)
- Terminals: Charbagh ↔ Vasant Kunj
- Length: 11.17 km
- Stations: 12
- Charbagh will be the interchange station with the Red Line

## Fares (single journey token, station-count slab system)
| Stations traveled | Fare |
|---|---|
| 1 | ₹10 |
| 2 | ₹15 |
| 3–6 | ₹20 |
| 7–9 | ₹30 |
| 10–13 | ₹40 |
| 14–17 | ₹50 |
| 18+ | ₹60 |

GoSmart Card: 10% discount on every journey, ₹100 refundable security deposit.
Tourist Card: ₹100 for 1-day unlimited travel, ₹250 for 3-day unlimited travel, plus ₹100
refundable security deposit.
Children under 90cm in height travel free.

## Station facilities
Free WiFi for smart card holders, free purified drinking water, and free toilets at every
station. CCTV and metal detectors installed at every station.

## App features
- Interactive Leaflet map of the network with live train position simulation
- Route planner with fare, duration, and next-train estimates
- Offline station and landmark ("nearest station") search
- Co-commute tool to find the optimal meeting station between two starting points
- Crowd-level estimates by time of day and station
- Works fully offline once loaded (PWA with service worker caching)

## Credit
Built by Astitva Bhardwaj. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/astitva-bhardwajlu/
